meta.name: 公众号封面/配图风格预设库
meta.description: 6 个命名风格预设，单一事实源。每个含 name/id/promptFragment/sample。生图脚本 scripts/gen-image.mjs 用 --style <id> 追加对应 promptFragment；样图 assets/styles/<id>.jpg 是给用户眼睛看的参考类型图（同一中性场景 + 各自风格生成）。
meta.sampleScene: A young content creator sitting at a tidy desk with an open laptop and a cup of coffee, a city skyline visible through the window behind.

styles.name: 杂志编辑风
styles.promptFragment: high-end editorial magazine cover aesthetic, refined typography-forward composition, sophisticated muted color palette, generous negative space, elegant soft studio lighting, print-quality, understated and premium, art-directed layout

styles.name: 极简大字
styles.promptFragment: ultra-minimalist poster design, one bold oversized focal element on a flat solid-color background, high contrast, a single accent color, vast empty space, clean geometric balance, calm and confident, graphic-design driven

styles.name: 真实摄影感
styles.promptFragment: photorealistic editorial photography, natural soft window light, shallow depth of field with pleasing bokeh, realistic skin and material textures, candid documentary mood, shot on a 35mm prime lens, true-to-life colors, no illustration

styles.name: 扁平插画
styles.promptFragment: modern flat vector illustration, clean geometric shapes, bright friendly palette, simple two-tone shading, crisp outlines, tech-editorial explainer illustration style, cheerful and approachable, no photorealism

styles.name: 国潮中式
styles.promptFragment: 国潮 new-Chinese-style graphic, ink-wash brush textures fused with contemporary flat design, traditional Chinese auspicious motifs and cloud/mountain patterns, palette of vermilion red, gold and indigo, bold oriental poster composition, modern yet culturally rooted

styles.name: 商务信息图
styles.promptFragment: clean business infographic style, structured grid layout, tidy iconography and simple charts/diagram motifs, corporate blue and neutral-gray palette, data-driven and professional, flat vector, clear visual hierarchy, trustworthy and precise
